statement.p: A backyard swimming pool contains {17000\ {\rm gal}} of water when its full. If it is filled at a rate of {567\ {\textstyle\frac{\rm\mathstrut gal}{\rm\mathstrut hr}}}\text{,} how many hours will it take to fill? Write an equation where the solution is the amount of time, in hours, that it will take to fill the pool with water. There is no need to solve the equation.
